raw_consumer_statement: In the month of XXXX, my XXXX card provider stated that my credit card was max out. When I checked, I found that it was unauthorized used successively by out of state merchant. I told Citibank that it was fraud but no response and with follow up calls, they said iI have to pay for the amount first, and I have to go after the merchant to pay back to Citibank, then the XXXX will credit back to me. I contacted the mrechant who stated it was a mistake but till date I am still responsible for this fraudulent charges as well as the accrued interest.
